Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}See? We got in no problem. Man, I'm a genius![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Is there really something to brag about here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}So you unlocked it earlier. Très bien![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}We should find somewhere to get ourselves ready. Your classroom should work, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Tray Ben? Is that French or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Why're they talkin' in different languages anyway...?[n]{f 1 1}
